devdoc.details: paymasterAndData layout:           [0  :20] — this paymaster address (set by wallet / bundler tooling)           [20 :40] — sponsoring org address (caller-supplied, 20 bytes)         Sponsored calls must use the standard execute(address,uint256,bytes) selector         (Coinbase Smart Wallet, ERC-4337 SimpleAccount, and most compatible wallets).         The resolved call target must belong to the sponsoring org — checked by walking         the on-chain ownership chain: org → program → token/distribution/crowdfunding.Management model:           • By default the CGPaymaster owner (= CGRegistry deployer) manages every org's stash.           • An org can opt into self-management via `transferManagement`.           • Only the current manager may `withdraw` or re-`transferManagement` an org's budget.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.actualGasCost: Actual ETH charged by the EntryPoint for this operation.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.newManager: The new manager address. Use address(0) to revert to CGPaymaster owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params.maxCost: Maximum ETH the EntryPoint may charge for this operation.

returns.context: Encoded (org, reserved) passed to postOp for settlement.
returns.validationData: 0 = valid; SIG_VALIDATION_FAILED constant if invalid (not used here).

params.org: The CGOrganization whose budget to reduce.

EXECUTE_SELECTOR.details: keccak256("execute(address,uint256,bytes)")[0:4]      Used by Coinbase Smart Wallet, ERC-4337 SimpleAccount, and most compatible wallets.

ORG_DATA_OFFSET.details: Byte offset where the org address starts inside paymasterAndData.

devdoc.title: CGPaymaster — ERC-4337 Paymaster for Chain.Giving gas sponsorship

depositFor(address).notice: Top up an org's gas budget. Sends ETH to the EntryPoint under this paymaster's deposit.         Callable by anyone — the registry owner tops up orgs as a managed service.

entryPoint().notice: The ERC-4337 EntryPoint singleton this paymaster is registered with.

lowBalanceThreshold().notice: Emit LowBalance when an org's remaining budget falls below this value (in wei).

managerOf(address).notice: Returns the effective manager for an org's budget.         Falls back to the CGPaymaster owner when no explicit manager is set.

orgBalance(address).notice: Per-org internal gas budget (accounting only; actual ETH lives at EntryPoint).

orgManager(address).notice: Who may withdraw or reassign an org's budget.         address(0) means the CGPaymaster owner manages the org (default).

postOp(uint8,bytes,uint256).notice: Called by the EntryPoint after UserOperation execution.         Refunds unused gas to the org's budget and emits monitoring events.

registry().notice: The Chain.Giving registry used to verify org and program addresses.

setLowBalanceThreshold(uint256).notice: Update the low-balance warning threshold. Only callable by the CGPaymaster owner.

totalDeposit().notice: Total ETH deposited at the EntryPoint under this paymaster's account.

transferManagement(address,address).notice: Hand over management of an org's gas budget to a new address.         Allows an org owner to self-manage their stash instead of relying on the registry owner.         Only the current manager may call this.

validatePaymasterUserOp((address,uint256.notice: Called by the EntryPoint before UserOperation execution.         Validates the sponsoring org has sufficient budget and that the call targets         a contract owned by that org. Reserves the maximum possible gas cost.

withdraw(address,address,uint256).notice: Withdraw unused ETH from an org's budget. Only callable by the org's manager.

userdoc.notice: Sponsors gas for beneficiary and organization owner UserOperations.         Each organization has an independent ETH budget tracked on-chain.         The total ETH is held at the EntryPoint under this paymaster's deposit;         per-org accounting is maintained in the `orgBalance` mapping.         Validation is fully on-chain — no off-chain relayer or signing service needed.
